title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.322 - Funding mechanisms, allowable — deposits with commission, purpose
text:
238.322.  Funding mechanisms, allowable — deposits with commission, purpose. — 1.  A corporation may use any one or more of the funding methods specifically authorized by sections 238.300 to 238.360 and any other lawful funding the corporation may obtain for the project.
  2.  The commission may by contract with a corporation receive any revenue received by a corporation from any funding method authorized by sections 238.300 to 238.360.  Such revenue shall be deposited by the commission pursuant to section 227.180 and applied by the commission to project costs including debt service on revenue bonds or refunding bonds issued by the corporation or the commission under sections 238.300 to 238.360.
(L. 1990 S.B. 479 & 649 § 19) 
Effective 5-30-90
